channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain cover 'clangs' each time a vehicle drives over it, 14th May
item.description:
On Stoke Road, between the pedestrian cossing and the roundabout travelling towards Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath ahead closed sign left on verge for 2 months, 14th May
item.description:
9 Springbank Way Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Springbank Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: A number of dangerous potholes that trigger the vehicle anti skid and traction control, 14th May
item.description:
Her GCHQ, Turning right out of Telstar way onto the A40 going west . THESE HAVE BEEN HERE FOR WEEKS AND ARE UNSAFE.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light is not working., 14th May
item.description:
The lamp post with the faulty light is on the footpath outside properties 25 [mine], 22, 23 and 19 Buckles Close, all at postcode GL53 8QT. The issue has been going for a couple of days. Kind regards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Buckles Close, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2) large pothole, unsure on depth but getting worse., 14th May
item.description:
Outside Lower Laynes, as plotted using pin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple small potholes, 14th May
item.description:
Outside number 15 lypiatt street, and running for a span of around 10m. These are routinely fixed, poorly and individually. Opened up again for the umpteenth timw because they are never dealt with as a whole. It needs one single large covering over all of the cracks and fixing them piecemeal leaves many little holes and fissures for the rain and tyre pressire to start the process all over again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Princes Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1) large pothole that is substantially worse since inspection - may have damaged vehicle, 14th May
item.description:
Outside Lower Laynes - as plotted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree over hanging road, 14th May
item.description:
Tree hanging low over road. Looks like it could come down, potentially on someone, especially if a lorry, tall van clips it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous obstacle, 14th May
item.description:
The council installed new bins and moved their location. Previously hidden, this sharp metal end from a previous road sign is harmful for all pedestrians or cyclists. In front of The London Inn pub where the double yellow lines start.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Long tyre track width pothole, 14th May
item.description:
Just as you come off the roundabout from Shurdington Road there is a long tyre track pothole on the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
